content: uv (Astral) is the 2026 default for dependency locking: single cross-platform uv.lock, ~8-10x faster than pip-tools, auto-maintained via uv add/remove. pip-tools remains valid for teams wanting to stay closest to pip semantics. For hash-verified installs use uv export --format requirements-txt (with hashes) or uv.lock directly, combined with pip-audit / --require-hashes for install-time verification.
